# NSURLHandle.Status.notLoaded

**Case**

The resource data has not been loaded.

## Declaration

```swift
case notLoaded
```

## Constants

- **NSURLHandle.Status.loadSucceeded**: The resource data was successfully loaded.
- **NSURLHandle.Status.loadInProgress**: The resource data is in the process of loading.
- **NSURLHandle.Status.loadFailed**: The resource data failed to load.
